title: FELIWAY Classic 30 Day Cat Calming Plug In Pheromone Diffuser Starter Kit, 48ml - Helps Solve Common Signs of Stress in Cats & Kittens, Veterinary Recommended, Clinically Proven
features: VET RECOMMENDED AND EASY TO USE: The original clinically proven cat calming brand, FELIWAY Classic is trusted by vets to improve your cat’s well-being with an easy, hassle-free application, backed by decades of expertise.

SOLVE COMMON SIGNS OF CAT STRESS: FELIWAY Classic helps cats feel calm, and reduces signs of stress such as scratching, urine spraying, fears and behaviour changes.With 25+ years of expertise, FELIWAY is approved by over 14 million cats worldwide
HAPPINESS AT HOME FOR CATS AND KITTENS: FELIWAY Classic plug in diffuser uses the science of pheromones to send happy messages to your cat to help them feel more safe and secure
PROVIDES 4 WEEKS OF CALMING SUPPORT: With just one refill, the diffuser offers up to 30 days of continuous calming benefits, helping your cat feel relaxed every day

COVERS LARGE LIVING SPACES: Each diffuser covers an area up to 70m², ensuring widespread calming support throughout your home for cats of all ages. To get started, simply plug into a socket in your cat's favourite room
